# CDMX — Embedded Operator

> An embedded operator for B2B companies, based in Bruges, Belgium. Founded by Renke Pieters. One operator across digital growth, business strategy, and AI & automation, embedded inside the team for a year, one client at a time. Works alongside existing teams, agencies, and vendors.

## What this is
CDMX is an embedded operator for B2B companies with 20–200 employees in Belgium and Europe. One operator sits inside the team for a year and runs three domains as one compounding system: digital growth, business strategy, and AI & automation. The embedded-operator model is structurally different from an agency, a fractional CMO, or a consulting engagement — not better, different. Agencies are built for service-hours-scale delivery across multiple clients. Fractional CMOs bring part-time senior marketing leadership. Consultants bring outside analysis. An embedded operator sits in the seat for a year and owns outcomes across three domains at once, alongside whichever teams, agencies, and vendors are already in place.

## Operator
- Renke Pieters — Founder. 8+ years as an independent operator. 3 postgraduates: Digital Marketing, Humane AI, Experience Architecture. Keynote speaker on growth, AI, and B2B strategy. Ironman finisher. Based in Bruges, Belgium.
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/renkepieters

## Three domains, one brain
- Digital Growth — Growth architecture that reinforces itself. Attribution you trust, channels that feed each other, experiments designed to teach win or lose.
- Business Strategy — Business model to execution in weeks, not quarters. Clarity that gets board sign-off and team alignment in a single meeting.
- AI & Automation — Production AI systems shipped into live workflows. Not pilots. Operational leverage that multiplies.

## Engagement model
- One year, embedded. Inside the team, not alongside it.
- One client at a time.
- Works alongside your existing teams, agencies, and vendors.
- Filter: B2B, 20–200 people, post-PMF, at a growth inflection. Not every buyer fits.

## Track record
- 20+ AI sessions delivered inside B2B teams.
- Digital growth work for international brands across industries.
- €2M+ new revenue attributed through channels that didn't exist before, in an 18-month embedded engagement.
- 3x faster audit cycles via custom AI review tooling shipped to production.
- Production AI systems running in live workflows. Not pilots.

## Brand
- Tagline: Connect the dots. Compound the results.
- Baseline: Where digital works.
- Manifesto opener: I connect dots that don't want to be connected.
